task: Create and verify the public Family Intelligence System category, founding archive, starter download, German private gateway, and reusable private portal templates.
surface: FrankX public web routes and authenticated family gateway
audience: Family stewards, relatives, archivists, and technical adopters
first_read: A family needs governed memory and continuity, not merely a tree.

references.label: FrankX brand pack
references.reason: Typography, color roles, sentence-case hierarchy, and proof-led copy

references.label: Premium Intelligence Web OS
references.reason: Static composition first, useful first win, and verification requirements

keep: Editorial hierarchy and generous quiet space
Exact trust-state interface as the focal asset
avoid: Unverified metrics or fake family data
direction.signature: The governed knowledge chain: Claim, Evidence, Consent, Steward, Scope.
system: Sage for trusted states, amber for review, rose for blocked
Existing FrankX display, sans, and mono typography
No generated media or external visual dependency
Local-only privacy planner as the first useful interaction

asset_quality.why_premium: The mechanism itself is rendered as exact, accessible interface rather than decorative metaphor.

artifacts.notes: Rendered on the Vercel preview at 1280x720 and 390x844; hierarchy, links, local privacy planner, conservative child-publication result, and zero horizontal overflow verified.
Rendered on the Vercel preview at desktop and mobile; public-boundary copy, contribution route, private-portal separation, and zero horizontal overflow verified.
Rendered on the Vercel preview at desktop and mobile; seven-circle German hierarchy, Vercel/v0 adoption links, and zero horizontal overflow verified.
Unauthenticated Vercel preview shows the locked German gateway and loads no family records; sign-in and pilot-maturity language are explicit.
Rendered at desktop and mobile; ZIP link and contents list verified. The local ZIP was independently enumerated and SHA-256 hashed.
Private v0 template inspected at 1280x720 and 390x844; zero records, seven circles, secure intake, steward queue, minor safeguards, and separate continuity protocols verified.
German runtime portal verified fail-closed on Vercel at desktop and mobile with no runtime errors or horizontal overflow.

checks.name: asset-tier
checks.evidence: Tier C exact UI/system asset is the correct medium for a trust and authorization product.

checks.name: export-inspection
checks.evidence: Actual Vercel and v0 renders were inspected at 1280x720 and 390x844. The in-app screenshot endpoint was unavailable, so evidence uses the live accessibility tree, rendered geometry, interaction state, and deployment telemetry.

checks.name: visual-qa
checks.evidence: Five FrankX routes and the runtime portal have no horizontal overflow, preserve heading/link semantics, expose a skip link and labeled planner controls, and produced no preview-origin console or Vercel runtime errors. The planner kept child data in Descendants & guardianship even when public publication was requested.

checks.name: privacy-boundary
checks.evidence: Public routes contain no individual living-relative or child data; each private route group re-checks the family session on the server, with proxy redirect as defense in depth.

checks.name: live-preview-baseline
checks.evidence: Vercel Git previews for FrankX commit 38ca7ffe and runtime commit cf4355d are Ready. Production promotion remains intentionally human-gated.

score.notes: The exact-interface mechanism, bilingual hierarchy, locked private gateway, responsive previews, local privacy planner, and template adoption paths pass the premium gate. One point remains reserved for authenticated multi-person data states, one for repeatable screenshot capture, and one for production-after-merge verification.

known_risks: Existing single-admin credentials are a pilot gate, not multi-person family authentication.
Legacy family records remain in a public Git history and require migration plus a separately approved purge decision.
Secure intake and verified contact address are intentionally not opened yet.
Before live intake persistence, confirm a non-owner application DB role or force RLS and require an explicit production NODE_ENV.
The in-app screenshot and keyboard-focus capture paths were unreliable; live DOM, accessibility-tree, geometry, interaction, and runtime-error checks completed successfully.
Production merge, adult living-tribute consent decisions elsewhere on FrankX, invitations, mailbox, and domain changes remain human-gated.
